nodes.name: admin.css
nodes.summary: Primary design-system stylesheet for the admin dashboard, defining the leather/amber-gold CSS custom-property theme (colors, spacing) plus styles for the sidebar nav, mobile header, cards, stat widgets, data tables with sticky columns, forms, dropdown panels, modals, badges, and a floating action button.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a large `:root` custom-property palette (leather/amber theme) consumed throughout the file and likely shared conceptually with other panel stylesheets; organized into ~50 commented sections covering layout, tables, forms, and overlays.

nodes.name: ie.css
nodes.summary: Mobile-first stylesheet for the Industrial Engineer (IE) panel, styling the IE container, line-balancing/workstation-plan views, and related layout sections specific to the IE role.

nodes.name: offline.css
nodes.summary: Styles for offline/connectivity UI affordances: a fixed offline status indicator, sync-pending badge, offline banner, queued-action indicator, header connection status, and toast notifications for sync events, with mobile adjustments.

nodes.name: shop-floor.css
nodes.summary: Touch-optimized UX stylesheet for shop-floor screens, defining extra-large touch targets for gloved-hand interaction, action button states (success/error/warning/loading with animations), and enlarged quantity-input controls.
nodes.languageNotes: Extends the base design tokens with shop-floor-specific `:root` variables (e.g. `--touch-target-xl/xxl/giant`) tuned for industrial touch-screen use.

nodes.name: supervisor.css
nodes.summary: Mobile-first stylesheet for the Supervisor panel, covering the supervisor header/controls and the Morning/Hourly/Adjustment/Feed/OT/Shift-Summary section layouts plus status badge color variants.
